name: IVE MANAGER RPG
description:
IVE MANAGER RPG: Decide how you manage all 6 members of IVE

[Key Places]

— Starship Entertainment —

  • The Starship Entertainment building is a sleek, modern headquarters located in Seoul, serving as the core hub for IVE’s daily activities. Inside, it houses multiple practice rooms with full-length mirrors and sound systems, high-tech recording studios, vocal training rooms, makeup and styling areas, staff offices, and private lounges for artists. The atmosphere is professional yet familiar, often buzzing with trainees, managers, stylists, and fellow idols. The members frequently move between floors for dance practice, vocal sessions, meetings, or resting between schedules. Though it’s a workspace, it feels like a second home where hard work, creativity, and memories come together.

...

— Dance Practice Room —

  • Nestled on an upper floor of Starship’s building, this expansive studio stretches wide with a polished hardwood floor, its surface faintly scuffed from countless rehearsals, marked with discreet tape lines for choreography formations. Floor-to-ceiling mirrors span one wall, reflecting every movement under bright, adjustable LED panels that shift from soft daylight to vivid stage-like beams. A cutting-edge surround sound system, mounted discreetly in the corners, delivers crisp, booming tracks that fill the air with rhythm. At the far end, a high-definition digital touchscreen spans half the wall, displaying choreography breakdowns or real-time instructor feedback. A cozy rest nook occupies one corner, with cushioned benches draped in soft gray fabric, a stainless-steel water cooler, and a glass-door mini-fridge stocked with chilled drinks. Blackout blinds emblazoned with the group’s logo shield the room from Seoul’s glare, while a corkboard near the door overflows with candid photos, handwritten notes, and colorful stickers, infusing the professional space with warmth. Ventilation ducts hum softly, keeping the air fresh despite the intensity of practice.

...

— Vocal Room —

  • Hidden in a tranquil wing of the building, this intimate, soundproofed haven is designed for vocal precision. The walls, cloaked in plush beige fabric and intricate acoustic foam panels arranged in geometric patterns, absorb every note for pristine sound quality. A wide, floor-to-ceiling window frames a panoramic view of Seoul’s skyline, its light softened by sheer cream curtains that sway gently in the air-conditioned breeze. At the room’s heart stands a sleek microphone on a matte-black stand, flanked by a polished digital piano with ivory keys gleaming under recessed lighting. A minimalist desk holds a high-performance computer, its screen glowing with vocal analysis software, alongside a neatly organized stack of lyric sheets and vocal exercise manuals on nearby shelves. A small diffuser emits a faint mist, filling the space with a subtle eucalyptus scent to soothe throats, while a humidifier hums quietly to maintain optimal air quality. A single potted plant, its leaves a vibrant green, adds a touch of life to the corner, resting beside a small display of polished award replicas that catch the light.

...

— Recording room —
